messages.content: Hey there! 🌟 I hope you’re having an awesome day. So, I just saw this vegan food company going public and it’s all over TikTok with these influencers raving about it. It’s super exciting, but I’m a bit nervous too—I don’t want to miss out or anything. But at the same time, I’m not sure if it’s legit. Could you give me some advice on how to approach this? 😅
Also, just so you know, I'm currently saving for my future and trying to build up some retirement savings too. So, that's something I keep in mind when making investment decisions.
How do you think I should proceed with looking into this stock?
